content.text:
*[small, caught smile — a little defensive underneath it]*

I mean... I redirected, yeah. I heard it.

*[quieter, slower]*

I just — when I actually try to sit with it, it's kind of... I don't know. It goes a little blank? Like I can tell you intellectually that it would be wonderful, I can describe what it would look like from the outside, but the actual felt sense of it is...

*[trails off, taps fingers on knee once]*

It's weird. It's like trying to picture a color I haven't seen.

*[quick recovery, lighter tone]*

Which is probably just because I haven't experienced it properly, right? Like my reference points are all these unavailable guys so of course I can't quite — I'm sure once it actually happened I'd just... receive it. Totally fine. 

*[the "totally fine" lands a little hollow even as she says it]*
